headline: Welltower Board of Directors Approves 15% Increase in Quarterly Dividend to $0.85 per Share
summary: Welltower Inc. (NYSE: WELL) ("Welltower" or the "Company") today announced that it expects to raise its quarterly common stock dividend to $0.85 per share, beginning with the second quarter of 2026. The declaration and payment of any future dividend remains subject to further review and approval by the Board.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Welltower, Raises Price Target to $237
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst John Kilichowski   maintains Welltower (NYSE:WELL) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $228 to $237.

headline: The Smart Money Is Quietly Buying These REITs
summary: Smart money is rotating into data centers and senior housing. One top activist REIT investor is making contrarian bets. Click here to read more on such moves.
